marapendi
  • Estimation
  • View page source

Estimation

Statistical estimation utilities, including cross-validation.

marapendi.estimation.cross_validation.get_complexity_levels(cv_results)[source]

Return sorted list of available model complexities (number of estimated parameters).

marapendi.estimation.cross_validation.get_folds_for_complexity(cv_results, n_parameters)[source]

Return fold list for a given number of parameters. Raises ValueError if not available.

marapendi.estimation.cross_validation.load_cross_validation_results(filepath, base_model)[source]

Load cross-validation results from CSV and rebuild fold structure.

Returns:

cross_validation_results – Returns None if file does not exist.

Return type:

list or None

marapendi.estimation.cross_validation.plot_cross_validation_curves(n_parameters, cv_results, case_list, case_table, condition_color, simulate_callback, model_builder, quantity_name='Cell voltage', quantity_symbol='$V_{cell}$', quantity_unit='V', case_titles=None, x_label='$i$ (A/cm$^2$)', save_path=None, dpi=300, uncertainty=0.1)[source]

Cross-validation curve plotting compatible with new cv_results format.

marapendi.estimation.cross_validation.plot_parameter_vs_complexity(cv_results, parameter_indices, base_model, parameter_units, condition_color, initial_parameters, plot_ci=False, n_cols=6, figsize=(14, 12), confidence=0.95, save_path=None, dpi=300)[source]

Plot evolution of parameters across complexity levels.

Parameters not yet estimated remain empty (NaN).

marapendi.estimation.cross_validation.plot_rmse_vs_complexity(cv_results, case_list, parameter_indices, base_model, model_builder, simulate_callback, ylabel='RMSE', quantity_multiplier=1000, use_median=True, plot_one_sigma_interval=False, figsize=(10, 4), xrotation=45, save_path=None, dpi=300)[source]

Plot train and test RMSE vs model complexity. Compatible with cv_results format.

marapendi.estimation.cross_validation.plot_rmse_vs_complexity_extrapolation(cv_results, training_test_case, extrapolation_cases, parameter_indices, base_model, model_builder, simulate_callback, ylabel='RMSE', quantity_multiplier=1000, condition_color={}, use_median=True, figsize=(10, 4), xrotation=45, save_path=None, dpi=300)[source]

Plot RMSE vs model complexity for conditions that are neither in the training nor the testing dataset, for a given fixed test case.

Parameters:

  • cv_results (dict) – Cross-validation results.

  • training_test_case (int or str) – The test case (left-out condition) used to select the fold.

  • extrapolation_cases (list) – Conditions not included in training or testing, to evaluate on.

marapendi.estimation.cross_validation.rmse_complexity_table(rmse_vs_complexity_df, filename=None)[source]
marapendi.estimation.cross_validation.run_cross_validation(base_model, parameter_indices, case_list, build_model, get_exp_data, min_parameters=1, cross_validation_results=None, estimate_kwargs=None, rmse_scale=1000.0, checkpoint_callback=None)[source]

Leave-one-out cross-validation with resume capability and automatic checkpoint saving.

Parameters:

checkpoint_callback (callable or None) – Function called after each complexity level. Signature: checkpoint_callback(cross_validation_results)

marapendi.estimation.cross_validation.save_cross_validation_results(cross_validation_results, filename, output_dir='.')[source]

Save cross-validation results to CSV.
